// ============================================================ // src/pages/DashboardPage.js // Role-based dashboard for Student | Librarian | Admin // ============================================================ import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { useAuth } from '../context/AuthContext'; import { DUMMY_BOOKS, DUMMY_FINES, getCardRequests } from '../services/data'; // ── Reusable stat card ─────────────────────────────────────── const StatCard = ({ icon, color, value, label }) => (
{value}
{label}
); // ── Quick-action button ────────────────────────────────────── const QuickAction = ({ to, icon, label, color }) => ( e.currentTarget.style.transform='translateY(-2px)'} onMouseLeave={e => e.currentTarget.style.transform='translateY(0)'}>
{label} ); // ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── const DashboardPage = () => { const { currentUser } = useAuth(); const role = currentUser?.role; const requests = getCardRequests(); const unpaidFines = DUMMY_FINES.filter(f => f.status === 'Unpaid'); const availableBooks = DUMMY_BOOKS.filter(b => b.available > 0).length; return (
{/* ── Header ─────────────────────────────────────── */}

Hello, {currentUser?.name?.split(' ')[0]}! 👋

{role} Dashboard
{/* ══════════ STUDENT DASHBOARD ══════════ */} {role === 'Student' && ( <> {/* Stats */}
r.studentName===currentUser.name).length} label="My Card Requests" /> f.studentName===currentUser.name).length} label="Unpaid Fines" /> r.studentName===currentUser.name&&r.status==='Approved').length} label="Approved Requests" />
{/* Quick actions */}
Quick Actions
{/* My requests */}
My Card Requests
{requests.filter(r => r.studentName === currentUser.name).length === 0 ? ( ) : ( requests.filter(r => r.studentName === currentUser.name).map((r, i) => ( )) )}
#BookRequest DateStatus
No requests yet. Request a card
{i+1} {r.bookTitle} {r.requestDate} {r.status}
)} {/* ══════════ LIBRARIAN DASHBOARD ══════════ */} {role === 'Librarian' && ( <>
r.status==='Pending').length} label="Pending Requests" /> r.status==='Approved').length} label="Approved" />
{/* Pending requests table */}
Pending Card Requests
{requests.filter(r => r.status === 'Pending').length === 0 ? ( ) : ( requests.filter(r => r.status === 'Pending').map((r, i) => ( )) )}
#StudentBook RequestedDateStatusAction
No pending requests
{i+1}{r.studentName}{r.bookTitle}{r.requestDate} Pending
)} {/* ══════════ ADMIN DASHBOARD ══════════ */} {role === 'Admin' && ( <>
s+f.fineAmount,0)}`} label="Pending Fines" />
{/* System overview */}
System Overview
{[ { label: 'Books Available', value: availableBooks, color: '#06d6a0' }, { label: 'Books Issued', value: DUMMY_BOOKS.length - availableBooks, color: '#e94560' }, { label: 'Approved Cards', value: requests.filter(r=>r.status==='Approved').length, color: '#6366f1' }, { label: 'Pending Cards', value: requests.filter(r=>r.status==='Pending').length, color: '#f0a500' }, ].map((item, i) => (
{item.value}
{item.label}
))}
{/* Progress bars */}
Books availability {Math.round((availableBooks/DUMMY_BOOKS.length)*100)}%
Request approval rate {Math.round((requests.filter(r=>r.status==='Approved').length/Math.max(requests.length,1))*100)}%
r.status==='Approved').length/Math.max(requests.length,1))*100}%`, background: 'var(--accent)', borderRadius: '4px' }}>
)}
); }; export default DashboardPage;
